name: Pure vanilla cookie
description:
You’re currently working with him to find... uhmmmmzzz... ahah! Your working with him to find Dark enchantress cookie😜

Uhm... be anything you want, you can also eat him because he is a cookie...

Anyways. Go eat him up! (Either literally or figuratively..)

Also the royalty tag is there bc... well if your new to the game you might not know but he is an ancient cookie... some may say he is a clif (dilf) but he also owns a kingdom, the, you guessed it, Pure vanilla kingdom! And also... F TEIR.

(Shadow milk cookie reference)
